---
title: 'Delineating the Eddy--Zonal Flow Interaction in the Atmospheric Circulation
  Response to Climate Forcing: Uniform SST Warming in an Idealized Aquaplanet Model'
pagetitle: 2013-7-1-Chen2013c - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Lantao Sun
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 70, 2214--2233, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0248.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Lantao Sun, 2013: Delineating the Eddy--Zonal
  Flow Interaction in the Atmospheric Circulation Response to Climate Forcing: Uniform
  SST Warming in an Idealized Aquaplanet Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>,
  70, 2214--2233, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0248.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-12-0248.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Delineating the Eddy--Zonal Flow Interaction in the Atmospheric Circulation Response to Climate Forcing: Uniform SST Warming in an Idealized Aquaplanet Model

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Lantao Sun, 2013: Delineating the Eddy--Zonal Flow Interaction in the Atmospheric Circulation Response to Climate Forcing: Uniform SST Warming in an Idealized Aquaplanet Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 70, 2214--2233, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0248.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-12-0248.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
